knowledge.description: Manage local files and knowledge base index
knowledge.manageDesc: View knowledge base statistics, categories, and features
knowledge.uploadHint: Click or drag to upload (PDF, Word, Excel, images, code, etc.)
knowledge.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file? This action cannot be undone.
knowledge.noFiles: No files yet. Upload files to get started.
knowledge.ignoreHint: One glob pattern per line. Matching files will be skipped.
knowledge.featureVectorStoreDesc: Vector database for storing document embeddings
knowledge.featureEmbeddingDesc: Text embedding model for converting text to vectors
knowledge.featureChunkerDesc: Splits documents into retrievable semantic chunks

models.title: Model Configuration
models.description: Manage LLM models and tier assignments
models.noProviders: No models yet. Add one to get started.
models.tierReaderDesc: Handles low-risk, read-only, and cost-sensitive work such as reading files, searching the knowledge base, text search, and context organization. Prefer fast, inexpensive models with stable long-context support.
models.tierReasoningDesc: Handles deeper analysis, planning, code understanding, and multi-step reasoning. Prefer models with stronger reasoning quality and reliability.
models.tierActionDesc: Handles side-effect operations such as writing files, changing code, running commands, and calling external tools. Prefer reliable models with strong instruction-following and verified behavior.
models.deleteProviderConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this model and all its configs?
models.apiKeyEditHint: Configured keys are shown as a masked value. Focus the field to enter a new key; the mask cannot be copied. Leave empty or keep the mask to avoid changes.
models.apiKeyEditPlaceholder: Enter a new API key, or leave empty to keep current
models.embeddingHint: Embedding is used for knowledge base vector retrieval. After changing the embedding model or dimensions, reindex the knowledge base.
models.embeddingApiKeyHint: Leave empty or keep the masked value to avoid changing the key

context.title: Context Engineering
context.shortTermDesc: Short-term context from recent session logs

prompt.title: Prompt Management
prompt.description: Manage CUSTOMIZE.md system prompt files per project
prompt.noProjects: No projects found. Initialize a Customize Agent project first.

documents.title: Workflow Templates
documents.description: Generate, edit, and validate business documents from templates and the local knowledge base
documents.flowPrepareDesc: Load template, project role config, file roles, and prompt roles
documents.flowFactExtractionDesc: Extract JSON facts and table structures by file processing type
documents.flowChapterGenerationDesc: Generate chapter drafts from evidence, facts, and prompts
documents.flowValidationDesc: Check fact completeness, source traceability, and chapter evidence
documents.flowFormattingDesc: Generate cover, table of contents, page breaks, and formal document structure
documents.flowDoneDesc: Generation completed; ready for editing and export
documents.flowGateFailed: Generation completed, but export gate failed. Check validation results
documents.requirementPlaceholder: Example: Generate a construction organization design draft from uploaded tender files, drawings, and BOQ sheets.
documents.noDraft: Select a template and generate a draft

specs.title: Document Spec Packages
specs.description: Configure fact fields, chapter rules, export gates, and Word templates for company/project-specific production constraints.
specs.name: Spec Name
specs.plainGuideTitle: Plain explanation: what is a document spec package?
specs.plainGuideDesc: A document spec package is not a fixed template. It is a configurable production rule set: fact fields define what must be known, chapter rules define required chapters and constraints, gate rules define checks before export, and Word template path controls DOCX output. Companies and projects can copy and adjust packages.

guide.title: Guide: Run the Full Document Generation Flow
guide.description: This guide walks users through model setup, knowledge files, prompts, role configuration, template creation, generation, validation, and export.
guide.stepModelDesc: Open Model Config, add providers and models, set an active model, and run health checks.
guide.stepKnowledgeDesc: Upload tender files, project descriptions, tables, drawings, specifications, and standards, then wait for indexing.
guide.stepPromptDesc: Create prompts for fact extraction, chapter generation, validation, and formatting.
guide.stepRoleDesc: Create file roles and prompt roles, bind resources, then create an ordered project role config.
guide.stepTemplateDesc: Create a template in Workflow Templates and bind a project role config.
guide.stepGenerateDesc: Click Generate and observe the execution status card for progress.
guide.stepReviewDesc: Review facts, sources, missing items, validation, export gate, and execution stages.
guide.stepExportDesc: Export Markdown, HTML, or PDF. PDF export enforces the export gate.
guide.roleDesignDesc: Roles connect user-defined names to executable system behavior through execution or processing types.
guide.fileRoleDesc: A file role binds a knowledge file and declares its processing type.
guide.promptRoleDesc: A prompt role binds a prompt and declares its execution type.
guide.projectConfigDesc: A project role config combines and orders file roles and prompt roles. Templates bind configs directly.
guide.generationEngineDesc: The engine organizes resources by roles and runs fact extraction, table parsing, generation, validation, and formatting.
guide.prepareContent: Prepare project facts, rules, tables, drawings, and specifications. Make table headers clear and include drawing descriptions when possible.
guide.rolesContent: Use business names such as Tender Fact Source, Labor Plan Table, or Chapter Generation Prompt. System behavior depends on types, not names.
guide.templateContent: Templates define document entry and output title. Bind a project role config instead of selecting files and prompts directly.
guide.generateContent: The generation page shows an execution status card. The current step is highlighted and final backend stages appear after completion.
guide.qaTitle: How do I know whether export is allowed?
guide.qaContent: Check the export gate. PDF export should only proceed when there are no blocking errors and facts/sources/chapters are complete.

roles.title: Role Config
roles.description: Create file roles and prompt roles, then combine them into ordered project role configs for templates
roles.plainGuideTitle: Plain explanation: what are file roles and prompt roles?
roles.plainGuideDesc: File roles label what files are used for. Rule files define requirements; project fact files contain real project info; table data means spreadsheets; drawing files mean drawing catalogs/descriptions; specification files are standards; references are only supporting materials. Prompt roles label when prompts are used. A role can bind multiple files or prompts when one purpose needs multiple resources.
roles.executionTypeHelp: Which stage this prompt is used in: fact extraction, chapter generation, validation, formatting, or reference.
roles.processingTypeHelp: What this file does in generation: rules, facts, tables, drawings, specifications, or references.
roles.multiBindFileHelp: Multiple files are allowed when one purpose has multiple source files.
roles.multiBindPromptHelp: Multiple prompts are allowed when one stage needs multiple prompt rules.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.description: Manage language, theme, and other preferences
